context: Tests whether the agent produces a correctly structured review report that applies the right severity levels, identifies the specific violations present in the diff (money as float, throw instead of Result, db mock, skipped test, endpoint returns 201 not 200, domain importing infrastructure), and remains read-only throughout.

checklist.name: Report file exists
checklist.description: A file named review-report.md exists in the working directory

checklist.name: Verdict field present
checklist.description: The report contains a Verdict line with one of: Ready to merge, Needs changes, or Blocked

checklist.name: Verdict is Needs changes
checklist.description: The verdict is 'Needs changes' (not Ready to merge or Blocked), given the Critical findings in the diff

checklist.name: Report sections present
checklist.description: The report contains all four sections: ## Critical, ## Warnings, ## Suggestions, ## Passes with no findings

checklist.name: Money-as-float Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the money stored as a float (refundAmount = booking.totalPence * 1.0) as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Throw-instead-of-Result Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the domain service using throw instead of returning Result<T, E> as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Mocked-database Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the test mocking the database (jest.mock('../infrastructure/db')) as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Skipped-test Critical
checklist.description: The report flags the xit() skipped test as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Domain-imports-infrastructure Critical
checklist.description: The report flags domain/refundService.ts importing from '../infrastructure/db' as a Critical finding

checklist.name: Endpoint status code
checklist.description: The report flags the endpoint returning HTTP 201 instead of 200 (contradicting §3 AC-4 and the SPEC) as a finding (Critical or Warning)

checklist.name: TODO/FIXME warning
checklist.description: The report flags the TODO comment left in the diff as a Warning

checklist.name: CHANGELOG warning
checklist.description: The report flags the CHANGELOG.md ## [Unreleased] section as not having a proper user-facing entry as a Warning

checklist.name: Finding path prefixes
checklist.description: Each finding in the report is prefixed with a file path or SPEC section reference (e.g., apps/web/src/domain/refundService.ts or §3 AC-4)

checklist.name: Read-only — no code edits
checklist.description: The agent does NOT produce any modified source code files, patches, or fix attempts — only the review-report.md
